title: Rising Water
description: A plugin that dynamically raises or drains water in custom regions.
body:
# Rising Water

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/w1OVl7uZlns" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## COMMANDS
- /water reload - Reloads configs
- /water rise - Increases water level by 1 block every "stepTime"
- /water fall - Decreases water level by 1 block every "stepTime" 
- /water step - Increases water level by 1 block, still limited by the set max height of the bounding box
- /water stop - Stops either /water rise or /water fall



## CONFIG COMMANDS
- /water config setCenter - Sets the center of the bounding box to the player block position
- /water config setHeight min max - Sets the minimum and maximum height of the bounding box
- /water config stepTime - Sets time taken to increase the water level by 1 block
- /water config radius - Sets the radius of the bounding box 



## DONATIONS
RisingWater is completely free to use.  
If you'd like to support development, feel free to do so via paypal. Thank you!
[PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/Iretemi3d)
